button_description: Self-hosted email security monitoring — SPF/DKIM/DMARC dashboard on Cloudflare Workers + D1

build.command: npm install && npm install --prefix dashboard && npm run build:dashboard

BASE_DOMAIN.description: Your root domain (e.g. yourdomain.com). Reports subdomain and sender address auto-derive from this.

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.description: Runtime API token with DNS:Edit + Email Routing:Edit permissions. NOT the deploy token — create a separate one. See README for required permissions.
